LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT RUKHSANA TASNEEM'S MOTION TO VACATE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT, WITH REASONABLE DILIGENCE, THE SUMMONS COULD NOT BE PERSONALLY DELIVERED TO DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT HAS SHOWN SHE DID NOT RECEIVE NOTICE. THE PROPOSED ANSWER MUST BE FILED WITHIN 5 DAYS OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Deem Admissions Requests As Admitted, Request For Attorney Fees, Costs And Sanctions Against Pltf Marvin Robinson And His Attorney
Off Calendar Nov-15-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RUKHSANA TASNEEM'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Deem Admissions Requests As Admitted, Request For Attorney Fees, Costs And Sanctions Against Plaintiff Marvin Robinson And His Attorney is transferred to Department 301 to be heard on the discovery calendar at 9:00 a.m. on November 15, 2013. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendant Rukhsana Tasneem'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Deem Admissions Requests As Admitted, Request For Attorney Fees, Costs And Sanctions Against Plaintiff Marvin Robinson And His Attorney
Off Calendar Nov-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rey Hassan, Esq. of Hassan Law Firm, Tel. 415.775.9700, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT RUKHSANA TASNEEM'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Deem Admissions Requests As Admitted, Request For Attorney Fees, Costs And Sanctions Against Plaintiff Marvin Robinson And His Attorney is granted. The parties did not agree to any stay of discovery while they engaged in settlement discussions; to the contrary, they expressly left discovery open. Plaintiff's discovery responses on October 31, 2013 were not timely. Defendant's Requests for Admission thus are deemed to be admitted as true. Plaintiff has waived objections to the Form Interrogatories and Special Interrogatories, and is ordered to serve verifications for his responses within 10 days of this signed order, if he has not already done so. Defendant's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $1400 for preparation and filing of this motion. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Set For Trial On Dec-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Mtn To Vacate Entry Of Default And Default
Off Calendar Apr-22-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHRISTINE CHORLEY OF CASALINA & DISSTON, TEL. NO. (510) 835-8110 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
MARVIN ROBINSON, PLAINTIFF ALSO APPEARING IN COURT;
ATTY. REY HASSAN, TEL. NO. 775-9700 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RUKHSANA TASNEEM'S Motion To Vacate Entry Of Default And Default is Granted. Plaintiff has failed to show that that, with reasonable diligence, the summons could not be personally delivered to Defendant. Defendant has shown she did not receive notice. The proposed answer must be filed within 5 days of entry of order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
